title: spiesia racemosa
intro: Spiesia racemosa, also known as Chrysanthemum balsamita or Yellow Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant native to East Asia, used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Spiesia racemosa include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its effectiveness in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Spiesia racemosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
